meta.title: Sounds
meta.subtitle: Russian vowels, consonants, stress, and soft/hard pairs.

blocks.text: Russian has 33 letters. Stress is unpredictable — always learn nouns with stress marked. Soft sign ь and hard sign ъ change pronunciation.

items: Practice soft л vs hard л
Palatalized consonants before е, ё, и, ю, я
Use 🔊 on every word in Vocab and Reading
